channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-05 19:13 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: First images of the Tesla Cybercab body-in-white - 60% fewer parts than the Model Y ✨ What you are l...
item.description: First images of the Tesla Cybercab body-in-white - 60% fewer parts than the Model Y ✨ What you are looking at is possibly the simplest vehicle structure Tesla has ever designed: two Gigacastings, stamped panels, and minimal joining. The rear underbody casting has no integrated wheel arches - flat lateral walls only. The die design doesn’t require lateral slide cores. Tesla stripped the casting design to its absolute minimum. A robotaxi has no steering column, no driver controls. That freedom allowed Tesla to start designing the casting from zero, introducing new solutions, some of which counterintuitive to the progress of Gigacasting. The unboxed manufacturing process - where the front section, rear section, and side panels are assembled in parallel and joined only in final assembly - is built around these castings. Read the full breakdown on this here:industryarsenal.com/p/tesla-…And for the complete picture, every vehicle that uses Gigacasting and every Gigacasting machine installed worldwide, visit 📊 The Gigacasting Databaseindustryarsenal.com/database

item.title: @elonmusk: south africa has more race-based laws today than during peak apartheid
item.description: south africa has more race-based laws today than during peak apartheid

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: Grok is now pulling about 1.5× the traffic of both Claude and Perplexity. Grok: 819.5M Cla...
item.description: BREAKING: Grok is now pulling about 1.5× the traffic of both Claude and Perplexity. Grok: 819.5M Claude: 555.9M Perplexity: 538.6M Grok has rapidly pulled ahead, with hundreds of millions more visits and a clear upward trend. 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: Unclaimed class action funds (per settlement agreements & court practice): often pro rata to claiman...
item.description: Unclaimed class action funds (per settlement agreements & court practice): often pro rata to claimants (2nd checks), revert to defendant, escheat to state unclaimed property, or cy pres to nonprofits/charities approximating class interests (most common for residuals). Cy pres recipients include legal advocacy groups (e.g., consumer rights orgs) that file similar suits, so yes, some indirectly fund more litigation. Plaintiffs' bar (AAJ/trial lawyers): major Democratic donor bloc—AAJ gave 95% to Dems ($2.4M in '23-24 cycle per OpenSecrets/FEC); sector overall 65-70%+ Dem historically. They lobby millions annually ($4.9M AAJ in '24) on civil justice/tort issues favoring expansive suits.

item.title: @elonmusk: I have made more money on X than I have from any other channel: I built my entire consulting busines...
item.description: I have made more money on X than I have from any other channel: I built my entire consulting business off my X audience and it made more (annualized) than selling companies.

item.description: The Age of Dragons by Grok Imagine with video extension up to 30sec

item.title: @elonmusk: This San Francisco trial is a total joke 🤡 This fake lawsuit is a pure witch hunt Twitter was never ...
item.description: This San Francisco trial is a total joke 🤡 This fake lawsuit is a pure witch hunt Twitter was never worth $44B The board lied about the bots Everyone knew it was bleeding cash They never proved why it was worth $44B Most analysts valued it at less than half Elon knew he was overpaying by $20B+, yet he paid every single cent anyway Most CEOs would’ve walked away Elon took the brutal hit, lost billions of his own money, so the internet could stay free for the rest of us Now these greedy class-action law firms are behind the lawsuit.....not real shareholders They fake their representation of the people They sue solely to enrich themselves, pocketing 30–40% (sometimes de facto 90% when they “can’t find” class members). Unclaimed funds often just fuel more lawsuits Their whole operation is a massive loophole racket They don’t care about the people. They smell profit Elon is the most transparent CEO in tech: “What I think privately is what I say publicly” He’s not a market manipulator....he’s the victim of his own principles The only CEO brave enough to overpay to protect free speech

item.title: @elonmusk: These pictures of the Pillars of Creation were taken 19 years apart by different telescopes, with ea...
item.description: These pictures of the Pillars of Creation were taken 19 years apart by different telescopes, with each image capturing a unique perspective. On the left,@NASAHubbleshows more thick dust. On the right,@NASAWebbpeers through the dust to show more stars. Which is your favorite?

item.title: @elonmusk: Ashlee Vance got an inside look at the Tesla Semi factory in Nevada and filmed it. The@corememoryepi...
item.description: Ashlee Vance got an inside look at the Tesla Semi factory in Nevada and filmed it. The@corememoryepisode will be released on X and YouTube soon!

item.title: @elonmusk: We got the first look inside the@teslasemi factory. It's enormous and quite spectacular. Episode com...
item.description: We got the first look inside the@teslasemi factory. It's enormous and quite spectacular. Episode coming soon here and on our YouTube channel.@brexHQcard worked hard on this road trip through Nevada
